igbo.build_an_equivalent_ratio_family: Wuo ezinụlọ nke ratios hà nhata
igbo.top_line_value_per_interval: Uru nke ahịrị elu maka interval ọ bụla
igbo.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Uru nke ahịrị ala maka interval ọ bụla
igbo.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: Unit 1 nke ahịrị elu kwekọrọ na
igbo.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: kwa interval ma ahịrị ala na-abawanye site na
igbo.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Tinye ọnụọgụ karịrị efu maka nhọrọ abụọ.
igbo.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Nhọrọ abụọ nwere otu cost per unit.
igbo.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A nwere cost per unit dị ala.
igbo.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B nwere cost per unit dị ala.
igbo.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Hazie ụkpụrụ ka unit rates abụọ nọgide na learning-model range.
igbo.rate_outside_model_range: Rate nọ na mpụga model range
igbo.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Ntụnyere ziri ezi na-ekewa cost ọ bụla site na ọnụọgụ nke ya. Ọnọdụ nwekwara ike gụnye ịdị mma, mfufu, ma ọ bụ mkpa ndị ọzọ.
igbo.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Ihe atụ a karịrị oke 1000% nke learning model. Hazie part ma ọ bụ whole.
igbo.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Nsonaazụ a karịrị oke ọnụọgụ 1,000,000. Hazie ụkpụrụ ihe atụ.
igbo.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: A naghị akọwa percent mgbe whole bụ efu. Tinye whole dị mma iji wuo tepu.
igbo.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: A naghị akọwa whole mgbe percent bụ efu. Tinye percent dị mma iji wuo tepu.
igbo.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Akụkụ iri hà nhata, nke ọ bụla na-anọchi 10% nke otu whole.
igbo.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Akụkụ ọ bụla e sere kpọmkwem bụ 10% nke otu whole. Akụkụ juputara nke ọma na-egosi fraction ziri ezi nke 10% ahụ.
igbo.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Tinye opekata mpe ụzọ coordinate abụọ ziri ezi, gụnyere otu nwere uru x na-abụghị efu.
igbo.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Ọ bụghị proportional: ihe akaebe egosighị otu unit rate na-agbanweghị nke na-agafe na origin.
igbo.x_values_comma_separated_2: Ụkpụrụ x, e ji comma kewaa
igbo.y_values_comma_separated_2: Ụkpụrụ y, e ji comma kewaa
igbo.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Jiri otu ọnụọgụ nke ụkpụrụ x na y. Graph nke quadrant mbụ a chọrọ ọnụọgụ na-abụghị nke rụrụ arụ n'ahịrị ọ bụla.
igbo.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Dozie ndepụta coordinate tupu ikpebi banyere proportionality:
igbo.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Ihe akaebe sitere na tebụl na unit rate
igbo.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: A gbatịrị ray proportional model site na origin.
igbo.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Ọ dịghị usoro points zuru oke maka ise graph.
igbo.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Ihe akaebe tebụl: ụkpụrụ y ÷ x niile akọwara hà na
igbo.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: points ndị e tinyere gụnyere (0,0) ma na-eso ray model.
igbo.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: ray model na-agbatị mmekọrịta na-agbanweghị site na (0,0), ọ bụ ezie na e tinyeghị origin.
igbo.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Lelee ma enwere ụkpụrụ y ÷ x na-agbanwe, uru y na-abụghị efu mgbe x = 0, ma ọ bụ points na-adịghị n'otu ahịrị kwụ ọtọ nke na-agafe na origin.
igbo.move_between_representations_and_expla: Gaa n'etiti representations ma kọwaa mmekọrịta mmụba.
igbo.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Kachasị mma maka ntụnyere ziri ezi n'ihi na a na-edegharị ọnọdụ ọ bụla kwa otu unit.
igbo.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Ratio e ji tụọ megide whole nke 100; jiri part = percent × whole.
igbo.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Ahịrị kwụ ọtọ nke na-agafe na origin na-egosi otu multiplier na-agbanweghị site na x ruo y.
igbo.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Buru ụzọ mee atụmatụ, chekwaa units, ma jụọ ma ọnụọgụ abụọ ọ gbanwere site na mmụba.
